topbar: 🔒 100% private — no account required, no data stored | HIV Hotline:

hero.sub: Powered by CDC NPIN & HRSA data. Thousands of free, low-cost, and confidential testing sites. No insurance, no judgment.

disclaimer: Data sourced from CDC NPIN & HRSA. Always call ahead to confirm hours. No personal data stored.

status.error: Could not reach server. Please check your connection.
status.noResultsSub: Try removing filters or expanding your search radius.

detail.selectSub: Click any result to see contact info, hours, and services.
tips: Call ahead to confirm hours & walk-in availability
Many sites test without ID or insurance
Bring ID if making an appointment
Rapid HIV results often available same day
Ask about PrEP if you want HIV prevention medication

reminder.title: Set a Testing Reminder
reminder.sub: Enter your number and we'll send one SMS reminder — never stored.
reminder.success: ✅ Reminder set! You'll receive an SMS in
reminder.error: Could not set reminder. Please try again.
reminder.privacy: Your number is used only for this reminder and never stored.

quiz.title: HIV Risk Assessment
quiz.sub: Answer 5 anonymous questions for personalized CDC-based testing recommendations.
quiz.disclaimer: Educational purposes only, not a medical diagnosis. No data collected.

questions.q: How long since your last HIV test?
In the past 12 months, have you had sex without a condom?
How many sexual partners in the past 12 months?
Have you ever injected drugs or shared needles?
opts: Yes, currently or in the past

questions.q: Have you ever been diagnosed with an STI?

low.title: Lower Risk Level
low.msg: Your current risk appears lower. CDC still recommends annual HIV testing if sexually active.
low.rec: Test annually. Continue using condoms and communicate openly with partners.

mod.title: Moderate Risk Level
mod.msg: You should be testing every 3–6 months and discussing PrEP with a healthcare provider.
mod.rec: Test every 3–6 months. Ask your doctor about PrEP. Use condoms consistently.

high.title: Higher Risk Level
high.msg: We strongly recommend getting tested immediately and speaking with a provider about PrEP.
high.rec: Get tested today. Ask about PrEP. Request a full STI panel. See an HIV specialist.

resources.title: HIV & STI Resources
resources.sub: Evidence-based information from CDC, NIH, and HRSA.

footer.tagline: Powered by CDC NPIN · HIV.gov · HRSA
footer.legal: Not a substitute for medical advice. No user data stored or shared.
